query: SELECT l.id, l.name FROM livers l WHERE l.name LIKE '%Ryu kyogoku%'; SELECT COUNT(*) as count_by_name, bl.streamerName FROM brand_livestreams bl WHERE bl.streamerName = (SELECT name FROM livers WHERE name LIKE '%Ryu kyogoku%' LIMIT 1) GROUP BY bl.streamerName;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user ViCMbGRGvoSuVwV.root --database GgA9WvTBCZMf6mjyMMwACw --execute SELECT l.id, l.name FROM livers l WHERE l.name LIKE '%Ryu kyogoku%'; SELECT COUNT(*) as count_by_name, bl.streamerName FROM brand_livestreams bl WHERE bl.streamerName = (SELECT name FROM livers WHERE name LIKE '%Ryu kyogoku%' LIMIT 1) GROUP BY bl.streamerName;
